description:
You are working inside a clean Ubuntu-like container whose user is “user” and home directory is /home/user.

A very small Kubernetes operator project is already present:

• /home/user/manifests/deployment.yaml  
• /home/user/manifests/service.yaml  

Every YAML file contains the usual Kubernetes “apiVersion”, “kind” and a “metadata” object with the keys “name” and “namespace”.

Your goal is to generate concise Markdown documentation for these manifests and then lint that documentation for trailing-whitespace problems.

Steps you must achieve (do NOT list the commands, just run them):

1. Create a new directory  
   /home/user/docs  

2. Inside that directory create a file named README.md whose **exact** contents are:

```
# Kubernetes Operator Manifests

| File | Kind | Name | Namespace |
|------|------|------|-----------|
| deployment.yaml | Deployment | demo-deployment | demo |
| service.yaml | Service | demo-service | demo |
```

Notes on README.md:
• It must end with a single newline (Line Feed).  
• No trailing spaces are allowed on any line.  
• The table pipe separators must be exactly as shown (no extra pipes or spaces).

3. Lint the new README.md for trailing whitespace by running the command

grep -n '[[:blank:]]$' /home/user/docs/README.md

Redirect the command’s standard output to a file called  
/home/user/docs/lint.log  

If README.md truly has no trailing whitespace the grep command produces no output, so lint.log must be an existing **empty** file (size 0 bytes).

Success criteria that the automated tester will verify:

• /home/user/docs/README.md exists with the exact byte-for-byte content shown above.  
• /home/user/docs/lint.log exists and its size is zero bytes.  
• The working directory and any other files may be left unchanged.
truth:
Initial files present before the task starts:

1. /home/user/manifests/deployment.yaml  
   Contents:
   ```
   apiVersion: apps/v1
   kind: Deployment
   metadata:
     name: demo-deployment
     namespace: demo
   ```

2. /home/user/manifests/service.yaml  
   Contents:
   ```
   apiVersion: v1
   kind: Service
   metadata:
     name: demo-service
     namespace: demo
   ```

Expected new artefacts after the agent finishes:

1. /home/user/docs/README.md  
   EXACT content (including trailing newline, no trailing spaces):
   ```
   # Kubernetes Operator Manifests

   | File | Kind | Name | Namespace |
   |------|------|------|-----------|
   | deployment.yaml | Deployment | demo-deployment | demo |
   | service.yaml | Service | demo-service | demo |
   ```

2. /home/user/docs/lint.log  
   • File exists.  
   • Size is 0 bytes (empty).  
   • Permissions: default user-created file permissions (rw-r--r-- or 644).

No other new files or directories are required.
